description: 37signals is the software company behind products including Basecamp, HEY, and Fizzy. On its public developer-facing surface for this domain, it directs developers to Basecamp APIs, SDKs, and an official CLI for working with Basecamp and AI agents.
summary: 37signals publicly exposes Basecamp developer surfaces: a tenant-scoped HTTP API authenticated with Basecamp OAuth 2 bearer tokens, plus an official `basecamp` CLI that authenticates via `basecamp auth login`.
